sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Clicking on the T-shape also had `gameplay_changed: false` and `no_impact: true`. Only 1 cell changed (the HUD bar).
I'm completely stuck. Almost every action I take has `gameplay_changed: false`. The game seems to be in a state where most actions don't have any gameplay impact.
Let me review what I know from the very beginning of this level:
1. The game started with Left H buttons all ON and Right H buttons with the first one ON.
2. The Left V and Right V buttons were all ON.
3. The trigger animation showed changes in the grid area, but the grid itself didn't change.
4. Clicking on the Right H buttons toggled them (gameplay_changed: true).
5. Clicking on the Left H buttons toggled them (gameplay_changed: true).
6. Clicking on the trigger didn't complete the level.
Now, after many actions:
1. The Left H and Right H buttons are all OFF.
2. The Left V and Right V buttons are all ON.
3. The trigger still doesn't work.
4. Clicking on the Left H buttons doesn't toggle them anymore (gameplay_changed: false).
5. Clicking on the Right H buttons might still toggle them.
Let me try clicking on the Right H buttons to see if they still toggle. If they do, maybe I need to set them to a specific configuration before the trigger works.
Actually, I just realized something. The user said "NET-ZERO WASTE: your last 124 actions returned the board to a state already seen 124 actions ago". This means I've been cycling through the same states. The board state includes the button states, so if I've been toggling buttons, the button states would change. The fact that the board has returned to a previous state suggests that I've been toggling buttons back and forth, returning to the same configuration.
Let me try clicking on the Right H button 1 to see if it toggles. If it does, maybe I need to set all Right H buttons to ON before the trigger works.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the Right H button 1 to see if it toggles
# Right H buttons are at row 33, cols 33-60
# Button 1 is at cols 33-37
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 35}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
